title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 522.030 - Pleadings and proceedings
text:
522.030.  Pleadings and proceedings. — In such action the same pleadings and proceedings shall be had as before provided in cases of suits upon bonds with conditions other than for the payment of money, except as herein otherwise provided.
(RSMo 1939 § 3244) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2856; 1919 § 1006; 1909 § 1213
